title: Alatiliparis aptenodytes
taxonomy: Alatiliparis aptenodytes is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and was previously classified as part of the genus Neotinea. However, it was later reclassified into the new genus Alatiliparis. This reclassification is based on molecular and morphological studies that revealed its distinct characteristics. As a result, Alatiliparis aptenodytes is now recognized as a unique species within the Orchidaceae family.
